title: COSTI RELATIVI ALLA POSITIVITÀ IN ALLEVAMENTO A SALMONELLA IN SPAGNA
description: A guide for poultry producers to estimate the economic impact of Salmonella Enteritidis and Typhimurium outbreaks in Spain. It analyzes productivity losses in broiler and laying hen operations, including culling, processing, and product devaluation, and highlights the importance of biosecurity measures.
